entry.name: MARITIME_SIGNAL_VALID_FLAGS_LOCATION_VALID
entry.description: signal_location cannot be SIGNAL_LOCATION_INVALID (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_SIGNAL_VALID_FLAGS_TYPE_VALID
entry.description: signal_type cannot be SIGNAL_TYPE_INVALID (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_SIGNAL_VALID_FLAGS_DIRECTION_VALID
entry.description: signal_direction cannot be SIGNAL_DIRECTION_INVALID (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_SIGNAL_GENERATION_CANCELLED_FLAGS_PITCH_ANGLE
entry.description: Cancelled because vehicle pitch angle out of range. (cancelled: 1, not cancelled: 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_SIGNAL_GENERATION_CANCELLED_FLAGS_ALTITUDE
entry.description: Cancelled because vehicle altitude out of range. (cancelled: 1, not cancelled: 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_SIGNAL_GENERATION_CANCELLED_FLAGS_CROSS_TRACK_ERROR
entry.description: Cancelled because vehicle cross track error out of range. (cancelled: 1, not cancelled: 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_SIGNAL_GENERATION_CANCELLED_FLAGS_DEPTH
entry.description: Cancelled because vehicle depth out of range. (cancelled: 1, not cancelled: 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_SIGNAL_GENERATION_CANCELLED_FLAGS_ALONG_TRACK_DISTANCE_REMAINING
entry.description: Cancelled because vehicle position past TO waypoint. (cancelled: 1, not cancelled: 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_SIGNAL_GENERATION_CANCELLED_FLAGS_ALONG_TRACK_VELOCITY
entry.description: Cancelled because vehicle velocity towards FROM waypoint. (cancelled: 1, not cancelled: 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_ROUTE_ENTRY_ACTION_VALID
entry.description: routeEntryAction cannot be ROUTE_ENTRY_ACTION_INVALID (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_ROUTE_END_ACTION_VALID
entry.description: routeEndAction cannot be ROUTE_END_ACTION_INVALID (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_ROUTE_NUM_WP_VALID
entry.description: routeNumWaypoints must be gt 0 and lte size of routeWaypoints (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_WP_TYPE_VALID
entry.description: waypointType of all waypoints cannot be WAYPOINT_TYPE_INVALID or WAYPOINT_TYPE_ADRIFT (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_LAST_WP_TYPE_VALID
entry.description: waypointType of last waypoint cannot be WAYPOINT_TYPE_ARC (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_HOLD_TIME_VALID
entry.description: holdTime must be gt zero for waypoints with waypointType WAYPOINT_TYPE_HOLD and WAYPOINT_TYPE_LOITER (ROUTE_TYPE_SAFENAV excepted) (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_VMS_STATE_VALID
entry.description: The VMS state and substate must be correct for the route type (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_SAFENAV_SUBSURFACE_COLLISION_STATUS_VALID
entry.description: Safenav status cannot be SAFENAV_SUBSURFACE_COLLISION_ROUTE_OVERRIDE or SAFENAV_SUBSURFACE_COLLISION_CRASHBACK for ROUTE_TYPE_MISSION (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_SAFENAV_MISSION_SYSTEM_ROUTE_ID_VALID
entry.description: The safenav nominal_route_id must match the active mission system routeID for ROUTE_TYPE_SAFENAV with SAFENAV_SUBSURFACE_COLLISION_ROUTE_OVERRIDE or SAFENAV_SUBSURFACE_COLLISION_LOITER status (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_REENTRY_WP_VALID
entry.description: The safenav reentry_index must be a valid waypoint on the active mission system route for ROUTE_TYPE_SAFENAV with SAFENAV_SUBSURFACE_COLLISION_ROUTE_OVERRIDE status (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_SAFENAV_LOITER_VALID
entry.description: The turn radius must be lte the loiter_clearance for ROUTE_TYPE_SAFENAV with SAFENAV_SUBSURFACE_COLLISION_LOITER (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_ROUTE_UPDATED
entry.description: The route must be different to the last route of the same type received by the VMS (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_SAFENAV_COLLISION_STATUS_VALID
entry.description: Safenav status cannot be SAFENAV_COLLISION_ROUTE_OVERRIDE or SAFENAV_COLLISION_CRASHBACK for ROUTE_TYPE_MISSION (valid: 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_ROUTE_VALID_FLAGS_SAFENAV_AUTHORITY_VALID
entry.description: Safenav has the authority to command this route override (valid 1, invalid 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_GNC_NAV_DISCIPLINE_TERMINATION_FLAGS_POSITION_ACCEPTED
entry.description: The nav discipline external position solution has been accepted by all enabled SNX devices

entry.name: MARITIME_GNC_NAV_DISCIPLINE_TERMINATION_FLAGS_POSITION_REJECTED
entry.description: The nav discipline external position solution has been rejected by one or more enabled SNX devices

entry.name: MARITIME_GNC_NAV_DISCIPLINE_TERMINATION_FLAGS_MODE_ACTIVE_TIMEOUT
entry.description: The nav discipline routine has exceeded the maximum allowable time

entry.name: MARITIME_GNC_NAV_DISCIPLINE_TERMINATION_FLAGS_MESSAGE_INTERVAL_TIMEOUT
entry.description: The interval between external position messages received from MS has exceeded the maximum allowable time

entry.name: MARITIME_GNC_NAV_DISCIPLINE_TERMINATION_FLAGS_SNX_XPOS_TIMEOUT
entry.description: No OBSTXPOS message has been received from at least one enabled SNX device within the maximum allowable time

entry.name: MARITIME_GNC_NAV_DISCIPLINE_TERMINATION_FLAGS_SNX_FORE_XPOS_ACCEPTED
entry.description: The fore SNX has accepted the nav discipline external position solution

entry.name: MARITIME_GNC_NAV_DISCIPLINE_TERMINATION_FLAGS_SNX_AFT_XPOS_ACCEPTED
entry.description: The aft SNX has accepted the nav discipline external position solution

entry.name: MARITIME_GNC_NAV_DISCIPLINE_TERMINATION_FLAGS_PRIMARY_SOLUTION_UNCERTAINTY_TARGET_SATISFIED
entry.description: The target uncertainty for the primary solution was reached.

entry.name: MARITIME_GNC_NAV_DISCIPLINE_TERMINATION_FLAGS_PRIMARY_SOLUTION_MINIMA_FOUND
entry.description: An uncertainty minimum was found for the primary solution.

entry.description: Filesystem failure of log writer

entry.name: MARITIME_LOG_FAILURE_TERMINAL
entry.description: Terminal failure of log writer

entry.name: MARITIME_SAFENAV_AUTHORITY_RIDEALONG
entry.description: Safenav paths will NOT be followed by vehicle. Safenav exists as a ridealong.

entry.name: MARITIME_SAFENAV_AUTHORITY_FOLLOW
entry.description: Safenav paths will be followed by vehicle

entry.name: MARITIME_SAFENAV_AUTHORITY_NO_CHANGE
entry.description: No change to the current authority. This option is only valid in the `MARITIME_SAFENAV_AUTHORITY_REQUEST_*` messages.

entry.name: MARITIME_SAFENAV_AUTHORITY_ACK_RESULT_INVALID
entry.description: Safenav authority request had invalid entries and cannot be processed.

entry.name: MARITIME_SAFENAV_AUTHORITY_ACK_RESULT_SUCCESS
entry.description: Safenav authority request was successful.

entry.name: MARITIME_SAFENAV_AUTHORITY_ACK_RESULT_NOT_ALLOWED
entry.description: Safenav authority request is not allowed from this source.

entry.name: MARITIME_SAFENAV_AUTHORITY_ACK_RESULT_FAILED
entry.description: Safenav authority request failed.

entry.name: MARITIME_KIZ_EXTENT_STATUS_INVALID
entry.description: State of the KIZ extent is invalid or unknown.

entry.name: MARITIME_KIZ_EXTENT_STATUS_NOT_SET
entry.description: A keep in zone has not been set. Vehicle will not check position against any bounds.

entry.name: MARITIME_KIZ_EXTENT_STATUS_SET
entry.description: A keep in zone has been set. Vehicle will abort if position exceeds boundaries.

entry.name: MARITIME_KIZ_ERROR_NONE
entry.description: Keep in zone has been set and accepted as valid.

entry.name: MARITIME_KIZ_ERROR_INVALID_EXTENT
entry.description: KIZ bounds cannot be processed. e.g. Order of bounds incorrect (min > max).

entry.name: MARITIME_KIZ_ERROR_INVALID_COORDINATE
entry.description: Bounds provided are outside of latitude and longitude ranges.

entry.name: MARITIME_KIZ_ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER
entry.description: Parameter provided is invalid. e.g. radius too small or large

entry.name: MARITIME_WAYPOINT_ATTRIBUTES_SLOW_TO_POINT
entry.description: Decelerate when approaching waypoint (true: 1, false 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_WAYPOINT_ATTRIBUTES_COMPLETE_ON_SURFACING
entry.description: Complete waypoint on surface (true: 1, false 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_WAYPOINT_ATTRIBUTES_ENABLE_SAFE_SURFACE
entry.description: Enable safe surface mode for waypoint (true: 1, false 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_WAYPOINT_ATTRIBUTES_V2_SLOW_TO_POINT
entry.description: Decelerate when approaching waypoint (true: 1, false 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_WAYPOINT_ATTRIBUTES_V2_COMPLETE_ON_SURFACING
entry.description: Complete waypoint on surface (true: 1, false 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_WAYPOINT_ATTRIBUTES_V2_DISABLE_SAFENAV
entry.description: Disable safenav overrides for this waypoint (true: 1, false 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_WAYPOINT_ATTRIBUTES_V2_SAFENAV_NO_SKIP
entry.description: Safenav is not to skip the waypoint (true: 1, false 0)

entry.name: MARITIME_LEAK_DETECTION_INVALID
entry.description: Invalid status

entry.name: MARITIME_LEAK_DETECTION_OFF
entry.description: Leak detection is not running

entry.name: MARITIME_LEAK_DETECTION_NOMINAL
entry.description: No leak detected

entry.name: MARITIME_LEAK_DETECTION_WARNING
entry.description: Vehicle volume is decreasing

entry.name: MARITIME_LEAK_DETECTION_CRITICAL
entry.description: Baseline buoyancy reached critical limit

entry.name: MARITIME_SAFENAV_SURFACE_AUTHORITY_RIDEALONG
entry.description: Safenav overrides will NOT be followed by vehicle.

entry.name: MARITIME_SAFENAV_SURFACE_AUTHORITY_SURFACING_ONLY
entry.description: Safenav overrides in the danger zone will be followed by vehicle. Safenav overrides on the surface will NOT be followed by the vehicle.

entry.name: MARITIME_SAFENAV_SURFACE_AUTHORITY_SURFACING_AND_DIVING
entry.description: Safenav overrides in the danger zone AND on the surface will be followed by vehicle.

entry.name: MARITIME_SAFENAV_SURFACE_AUTHORITY_NO_CHANGE
entry.description: No change to the current authority. This option is only valid in the `MARITIME_SAFENAV_AUTHORITY_REQUEST_*` messages.

message.name: MARITIME_NAV_POSE_TELEMETRY
message.field: Timestamp (time since system boot).
Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Latitude, expressed as 1E-7 degrees
Longitude, expressed as 1E-7 degrees
Depth below sea level
Altitude above ground
Ground speed north (Latitude, positive north)
Ground speed east (Longitude, positive east)
Ground speed down (Depth, positive down)
Vehicle heading (yaw angle), 0.0..359.99 degrees. If unknown, set to: UINT16_MAX
Roll
Pitch
Body frame velocity forward
Body frame velocity starboard
Body frame velocity down
Waterspeed
Angle of attack
Angle of sideslip
Altitude in EGM96 reference (negative is deeper)
Altitude in WGS84 reference (negative is deeper)
Linear acceleration in body forward
Linear acceleration in body starboard
Linear acceleration in body down
Angular velocity in body forward
Angular velocity in body starboard
Angular velocity in body down
The validity status flag of the pose data (valid: 1, not valid: 0)
Horizontal position 1σ error ellipse: Semi-major axis
Horizontal position 1σ error ellipse: Semi-minor axis
Horizontal position 1σ error ellipse: Direction of semi-major axis
1σ pressure depth error
1σ altitude above ground error
Horizontal velocity 1σ error ellipse: Semi-major axis
Horizontal velocity 1σ error ellipse: Semi-minor axis
Horizontal velocity 1σ error ellipse: Direction of semi-major axis
1σ down velocity error
1σ roll error
1σ pitch error
1σ heading error
1σ EGM96 altitude error
1σ WGS84 altitude error
The nav pose has been continuous since this timestamp (ms since Epoch)
Timestamp in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch) representing the time the pose data is valid for.

message.name: MARITIME_WAYPOINT_SEGMENT
message.description: Current waypoint segment (from, to, next, next next, ...)
message.field: Number of segment waypoints
Type of waypoint
Latitude of waypoint
Longitude of waypoint
Vertical position of waypoint
Vertical position type of waypoint
Vertical rate for vertical position change to next waypoint
Vertical rate type for vertical position change to next waypoint
Speed to maintain until next waypoint
Speed type to use until next waypoint
Turn radius for waypoint
Hold time at waypoint
Index of the waypoint in the segment
Waypoint attributes
Waypoint attributes v2

message.name: MARITIME_HEARTBEAT
message.description: A generic heartbeat message to use for tracking network quality
message.field: Heartbeat counter

message.name: MARITIME_PING
message.description: A message to ping another network device on the mavlink layer to which a pong is expected as a response
message.field: Unique message identifier to be replied in pong

message.name: MARITIME_PONG
message.description: A pong to be sent as a response to a ping
message.field: Unique message identified copied from pong

message.name: MARITIME_VMS_STATUS
message.description: State and substate of the vehicle state machine
message.field: Current vehicle state
Current vehicle substate

message.name: MARITIME_APPEND_WAYPOINT
message.description: Append a waypoint to the staging route
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Unique identifier for this route
Index of waypoint in the route
Type of waypoint
Latitude of waypoint
Longitude of waypoint
Vertical position of waypoint
Vertical position type of waypoint
Vertical rate for vertical position change to next waypoint
Vertical rate type for vertical position change to next waypoint
Speed to maintain until next waypoint
Speed type to use until next waypoint
Turn radius for waypoint
Hold time at waypoint
waypoint_attributes
Waypoint attributes v2
Pitch at waypoint
Heading at waypoint
Route type the waypoint is to be appended to

message.name: MARITIME_APPEND_WAYPOINT_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgment of MARITIME_APPEND_WAYPOINT message
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Result of waypoint append
Identifier to be used for the staging route
Number of waypoints in staging after append
Route type associated with the waypoint

message.name: MARITIME_NEW_STAGING_ROUTE
message.description: Reset staging route and being defining a new route.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Identifier to be used for this route
Route type
Action to perform to connect the current route to the new route
Action to perform at the completion of this route

message.name: MARITIME_NEW_STAGING_ROUTE_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgment sent to MS after a new staging route has been created
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Result of creating new staging route
Identifier of the new staging route
Route type of the new staging route

message.name: MARITIME_COMMIT_ROUTE
message.description: Commit current route to the flight controller
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Identifier of route in staging to be committed
Number of waypoints expected in staging (for validation).
Route type of the route to be committed

message.name: MARITIME_COMMIT_ROUTE_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgment sent to MS after a request to commit route
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Result of route commit
Identifier to be used for this route
Number of waypoints committed to flight controller
Route valid flag (valid: 1, invalid 0)
Bitmap indicating which route flags are valid.
Route type of the route being committed

message.name: MARITIME_WAYPOINT_SEGMENT_STATUS
message.description: Details of the current waypoint segment consiting of a from waypoint and the sequence of planned waypoints (to, next, next next ...)
message.field: Timestamp (time since system boot).
Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Source route ID for the waypoint the current segment started at
Source route type for the waypoint the current segment started at
Index of waypoint within the source route that the current segment started at
Array of source route IDs for the sequenced waypoints
Array of source route type for the sequenced waypoints
Array of waypoint indices within the source routes for the sequenced waypoints

message.name: MARITIME_ROUTE_STATUS
message.description: Status information for a route type recieved by the FCS
message.field: Timestamp (time since system boot)
Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Route type (mission, contingency, safenav, etc.)
Flag for if the FCS has received a valid route of this type (valid route received: 1, no valid route: 0)
Identifier of the valid route of this type received by the FCS
Route complete flag (complete: 1, incomplete: 0)
Number of waypoints in the route

message.name: MARITIME_NEW_SIGNAL
message.description: Define a signal to be injected by the FCS.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Signal identifier
Location to inject this signal.
Type of this signal.
Direction of this signal.
Signal amplitude in units defined by signal location (angular acceleation rad/s^2, acceleration m/s^2, angle rad, thruster speed RPM, velocity m/s, VBS fill fraction [0,1]).
Signal duration in seconds.
Signal start frequency in Hz.
Signal end frequency in Hz.

message.name: MARITIME_NEW_SIGNAL_ACK
message.description: Status for the last signal sent to the FCS.
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Signal identifier
Signal valid flag (valid: 1, invalid: 0)
Bitmap indicating which signal flags are valid.

message.name: MARITIME_SIGNAL_GENERATION_EVENT
message.description: Command to control signal generation by the FCS.
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Control signal generation

message.name: MARITIME_SIGNAL_GENERATION_EVENT_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgment sent to MS after receipt of signal generation event
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to

message.name: MARITIME_SIGNAL_GENERATION_STATUS
message.description: Signal generation status.
message.field: Timestamp (time since system boot)
Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Current state of signal generation.
Signal identifier of the last valid signal received.
Signal generation cancelled flag (cancelled: 1, not cancelled:0)
Signal generation cancelled flags.

message.name: MARITIME_MANUAL_CONTROL_COMMANDS
message.description: Manual commands for the FCS
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Sets the control mode that determines which of the manual commands are used.
Time in seconds after loss of comms that the VMS will transition from Manual:Active to Manual:Stopped.
Heading rate command fraction between -1 and 1. Used in MARITIME_MANUAL_CONTROL_MODE_HEADING_RATE and MARITIME_MANUAL_CONTROL_MODE_HEADING_RATE_AND_DEPTH_RATE.
Depth rate command fraction between -1 and 1. Used in MARITIME_MANUAL_CONTROL_MODE_HEADING_RATE_AND_DEPTH_RATE.
Rudder angle command fraction between -1 and 1. Used in MARITIME_MANUAL_CONTROL_MODE_RUDDER and MARITIME_MANUAL_CONTROL_MODE_RUDDER_AND_STERN_AND_BOW_PLANES.
Stern plane angle command fraction between -1 and 1. Used in MARITIME_MANUAL_CONTROL_MODE_RUDDER_AND_STERN_AND_BOW_PLANES.
Bow plane angle command fraction between -1 and 1. Used in MARITIME_MANUAL_CONTROL_MODE_RUDDER_AND_STERN_AND_BOW_PLANES.
Primary thruster command fraction between -1 and 1. Used in all manual control modes.
VBS vertical trim command fraction between -1 and 1. Used in all manual control modes.
VBS pitch trim fraction between -1 and 1. Used in all manual control modes.

message.name: MARITIME_MANUAL_CONTROL_COMMANDS_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgment sent after receipt of manual control commands
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to

message.name: MARITIME_DEVICE_HEALTH
message.description: Reporting of device operating state and device health state
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Name of the device reporting operating state and health state
The device operating state being reported
The device health state being reported

message.name: MARITIME_BATTERY_STATUS
message.description: A detailed report of battery state
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
The battery address
The battery target state
The system state
General error (undocumented in battery protocol interface)
Error status 1
Error status 2
The battery capacity
The battery current
The battery voltage
The system voltage
The battery management unit temperature
Nominal charge current
Nominal voltage
Low cell voltage
High cell voltage
High load current
High charge current
Low cell temperature
High cell temperature
High battery management unit temperature
Charge complete voltage
Charge complete current
Number of cells
Number of modules
Heater status flag (on: 1, off: 0)
Auto balancing status flag (on: 1, off: 0)
State of charge (percentage)

message.name: MARITIME_REQUEST_STATE_TRANSITION
message.description: Request a state transition as defined by a state and substate
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)

message.name: MARITIME_REQUEST_STATE_TRANSITION_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgment of MARITIME_MISSION_EVENT message
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Result of event

message.name: MARITIME_MONITOR_OVERRIDE
message.description: Override or clear a contingency management monitor
message.field: Request identifier (copied to response)
Monitor identifier (from enumerated_monitors_t)
Set to 1 for force override or 0 to clear override

message.name: MARITIME_MONITOR_OVERRIDE_ACK
message.description: Acknowledgement of a request to override or clear a contingency management monitor
message.field: the `request_id` field of the request that this ACK is in response to
Result of override / clear request

message.name: MARITIME_MONITOR_TELEMETRY
message.description: Describes the state of a contingency management system monitor
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Name of the monitor described in this message
State of the current monitor
Is this monitor suppressed
Is this monitor overridden
Identifier / enumerator for this monitor

message.name: MARITIME_WCA_TELEMETRY
message.description: Describes the state of a contingency management WCA
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Name of the WCA described in this message
Describes triggered state of this WCA
Identifier / enumerator for this WCA
Level associated with this WCA (warning, caution, or advistory)

message.name: MARITIME_SHUTDOWN_REQUESTED
message.description: A shutdown of the vehicle is under way. Perform any required shutdown activities prior to power down

message.name: MARITIME_WCA_ABORT_TRIGGER_TELEMETRY
message.description: Contains the name of the WCA that triggered the last transition to the abort state
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
String name of the WCA enumeration that was the cause of the last transition to the abort state
Index of the WCA that was the cause of the last transition to abort state
Timestamp that event occurred (ms since system boot)
Timestamp of the abort (ms since system boot)
Timestamp of the abort in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)

message.name: MARITIME_GUID_CMD_TELEMETRY
message.description: Command telemetry outputs from guidance
message.field: Timestamp (time since system boot)
Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Ground speed command
Flag for the selection of the speed command (ground speed: 0, primary thruster: 1)
Primary thruster speed command
Flag if the vertical rate command is to dive (false; 0, true; 1)
Flag if the vertical rate command is to surface (false; 0, true; 1)
Vertical rate command
Directional rate command
Vertical position command
Flag if a subsurface hold is commanded (false; 0, true; 1)
Flag if a pre dive depth override is commanded (false; 0, true; 1)
Flag if a pre dive speed override is commanded (false; 0, true; 1)
Directional guidance mode
Vertical position type of waypoint
Flag if altitude bottomlock is lost and depth fallback is commanded (false; 0, true; 1)

message.name: MARITIME_GUID_TRACK_DATA_TELEMETRY
message.description: Track Data telemetry outputs from guidance
message.field: Timestamp (time since system boot)
Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)

message.name: MARITIME_PARAM_VALUE
message.description: Emit the value of a onboard parameter. The inclusion of param_count and param_index in the message allows the recipient to keep track of received parameters and allows him to re-request missing parameters after a loss or timeout. The parameter microservice is documented at https://mavlink.io/en/services/parameter.html. Mirrors PARAM_VALUE, but for a 64-bit value.
message.field: Onboard parameter id, terminated by NULL - applications have to provide 51 bytes storage if the ID is stored as string
Onboard parameter value
Onboard parameter type.
Total number of onboard parameters
Index of this onboard parameter
The status of the operation.

message.name: MARITIME_PARAM_SET
message.description: Set a parameter value (write new value to permanent storage). The receiving component should acknowledge the new parameter value by broadcasting a PARAM_VALUE message (broadcasting ensures that multiple GCS all have an up-to-date list of all parameters). If the sending GCS did not receive a PANDION_PARAM_VALUE within its timeout time, it should re-send the PANDION_PARAM_SET message. The parameter microservice is documented at https://mavlink.io/en/services/parameter.html. PANDION_PARAM_SET may also be called within the context of a transaction (started with MAV_CMD_PARAM_TRANSACTION). Within a transaction the receiving component should respond with PARAM_ACK_TRANSACTION to the setter component (instead of broadcasting PANDION_PARAM_VALUE), and PANDION_PARAM_SET should be re-sent if this is ACK not received. Mirrors PARAM_SET, but for 64-bit value
message.field: System ID
Component ID
Onboard parameter id, terminated by NULL - applications have to provide 51 bytes storage if the ID is stored as string
Onboard parameter value
Onboard parameter type.
